sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ الكَبْسَةُ مِنَ الأَطْبَاقِ المَشْهُورَةِ فِي دُوَلِ الخَلِيجِ العَرَبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Kabsa se smatra jednim od najpoznatijih jela u zemljama Arapskog zaljeva.
sentences.translationEn: Kabsa is considered one of the famous dishes in the Arab Gulf countries.

sentences.arabic: تَتَكَوَّنُ هَذِهِ الوَجْبَةُ مِنَ الأُرْزِ الطَّوِيلِ وَاللَّحْمِ أَوِ الدَّجَاجِ.
sentences.translation: Ovo jelo se sastoji od dugog pirinča i mesa ili piletine.
sentences.translationEn: This meal consists of long-grain rice and meat or chicken.

sentences.arabic: يُضِيفُ الطَّبَّاخُونَ مَجْمُوعَةً مِنَ البُهَارَاتِ العَرَبِيَّةِ لِتُعْطِيَ طَعْمًا مُمَيَّزًا.
sentences.translation: Kuhari dodaju mješavinu arapskih začina kako bi dali poseban ukus.
sentences.translationEn: Cooks add a variety of Arabic spices to give it a unique flavor.

sentences.arabic: يَجْتَمِعُ أَفْرَادُ العَائِلَةِ حَوْلَ مَائِدَةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ لِتَنَاوُلِ الغَدَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Članovi porodice se okupljaju oko jedne trpeze kako bi ručali.
sentences.translationEn: Family members gather around one table to have lunch.

sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ السُّيَّاحُ تَجْرِبَةَ هَذَا الطَّعَامِ اللَّذِيذِ عِنْدَ زِيَارَتِهِمْ لِلْمِنْطَقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Turisti vole probati ovu ukusnu hranu prilikom posjete regiji.
sentences.translationEn: Tourists love to try this delicious food when visiting the region.
